title: Wow I cant believe I didnt notice this early on
display_title: Wow I cant believe I didnt notice this early on
wikitext:
[]: Wow, I can't believe I didn't notice this early on. Post by SeanTucker » Tue Aug 26, 2008 9:47 pm Asuka's middle name, Langley, can be bastardized as "Rangrey". "Rangrey" sounds like "angry" if you pronounce it similarly to the original name. "Angry" is a very good description for Asuka. MIND = BLOWN

[]: Post by IrkenEvangelion » Tue Aug 26, 2008 9:51 pm SPAM! And it's not that Asuka is angry, it's that, like all the other characters, has issues that need to be worked out.

[]: Post by SeanTucker » Tue Aug 26, 2008 10:00 pm Okay, then, she would appear angry to the viewer before ep22, which was my point in the first place. Her "issues that need to be worked out" don't come to the forefront until nearly the end of the series. And how is this spam? Chit-Chat seems to be the right place for random "mind = blown" Eva discoveries.

[]: Post by IrkenEvangelion » Tue Aug 26, 2008 10:01 pm Just cause we don't learn of them until later doesn't mean they're not there.

[]: Post by ZapX » Tue Aug 26, 2008 10:02 pm DUDE. This is AWESOME! Also, Adam is close to MADAM. Adam is a female! And if you put a ten ten on the to in Misato it's miSADO. She's a SADIST! SADO? GET IT?

[]: Post by SeanTucker » Tue Aug 26, 2008 10:26 pm ZapalacX wrote: DUDE. This is AWESOME! Also, Adam is close to MADAM. Adam is a female! And if you put a ten ten on the to in Misato it's miSADO. She's a SADIST! SADO? GET IT?

[]: Post by IrkenEvangelion » Tue Aug 26, 2008 10:30 pm She's also not angry all the time, She likes to be show offy and shes SOMETIMES nice to Shinji. Like complimenting him on his Cello skillz.

[]: Post by Zeak » Tue Aug 26, 2008 10:52 pm Maby thats why the United States named the ship USS LANGLEY like most of the characters but yes any name can be basterdised

[]: Post by V » Tue Aug 26, 2008 10:53 pm spam Asuka is named for the first US aircraft carrier, and as she is biracial, they deftly also named her after the Soryu, which was at Pearl Harbor and Midway

[]: Post by SeanTucker » Tue Aug 26, 2008 11:05 pm Look, I know about the theme naming. The fact that she was named after the USS Langley doesn't exactly make her exempt from having an obscure pun in her name. And even if she is show-offy a lot of the time as well, that does take a bit of a backseat to how much of a complete PMSing bitch she is to most of the cast. Even in one of her biggest showoff moments (ep11) she still insults Rei for being "the favorite". The niceness to Shinji comes a grand total of twice that I remember in the series, and one moment is a huge stretch considering she attempts to suffocate him.

[]: Post by IrkenEvangelion » Tue Aug 26, 2008 11:08 pm And yet they can't be overlooked when judging her.

[]: Post by Zeak » Tue Aug 26, 2008 11:09 pm 13 year old girl... Nothing more is need to be said

[]: Post by Captain Mister » Tue Aug 26, 2008 11:16 pm SeanTucker, I don't think any one of your posts in this thread has made sense to me. Am I the only one? It would be nice if you could coherently explain what you're trying to....

[]: Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 26, 2008 11:16 pm This is spam. This will inevitably go nowhere. Requesting lock.

[]: Post by Evangelion__x » Wed Aug 27, 2008 1:04 am ...Nice.
